title: Senior AI Infrastructure Engineer (Europe based - Remote)
company_focus:
AI-powered healthcare platform for pain, women's health,
movement, and mental health
description:
Sword Health is shifting healthcare from human-first to AI-
first through its AI Care platform, making world-class
healthcare available anytime, anywhere, while significantly
reducing costs for payers, self-insured employers, national
health systems, and other healthcare organizations. Sword
began by reinventing pain care with AI at its core, and has
since expanded into women’s health, movement health, and
more recently mental health. Since 2020, more than 700,000
members across three continents have completed 10 million AI
sessions, helping Sword's 1,000+ enterprise clients avoid
over $1 billion in unnecessary healthcare costs. Backed by
42 clinical studies and over 44 patents, Sword Health has
raised more than $500 million from leading investors,
including Khosla Ventures, General Catalyst, Transformation
Capital, and Founders Fund. Learn more at
www.swordhealth.com.

As a Senior AI Infrastructure Engineer at Sword Health, you
will own the infrastructure that brings our AI models to
life in production. From optimizing LLM inference and
deploying real-time voice AI agents to scaling GPU clusters
that serve millions of sessions, your work will directly
power the AI Care platform that is transforming healthcare
worldwide.

You will sit at the intersection of ML and infrastructure -
designing systems that power real-time computer vision for
movement analysis, serve large language models for
conversational AI, and enable low-latency voice interactions
for AI agents. You'll ensure our models run at the speed and
scale our members expect. This is not a traditional DevOps
role; you'll be deeply embedded in AI-specific challenges
like inference optimization, real-time video processing,
model serving at scale, and GPU workload orchestration.

If you're passionate about pushing the boundaries of AI
infrastructure performance and want to do it in a mission-
driven environment where your work directly improves
people's health outcomes, we'd love to have you on our team.

Sword Health complies with applicable Federal and State
civil rights laws and does not discriminate on the basis of
Age, Ancestry, Color, Citizenship, Gender, Gender
expression, Gender identity, Gender information, Marital
status, Medical condition, National origin, Physical or
mental disability, Pregnancy, Race, Religion, Caste, Sexual
orientation, and Veteran status.
responsibilities: Own and build infrastructure for deploying and serving AI models in production at scale
Optimize LLM inference performance for real-time conversational AI applications
Deploy and scale real-time voice AI agents for healthcare interactions
Design and manage GPU clusters serving millions of AI sessions
Build systems for real-time computer vision inference for movement analysis
Enable low-latency voice interactions and video processing for AI agents
Implement model serving infrastructure with focus on speed, scale, and reliability
use_cases: Real-time computer vision for movement analysis in physical therapy
Conversational AI for patient interactions and health guidance
Voice AI agents for healthcare delivery and member engagement
AI-powered pain care assessment and treatment
Women's health, movement health, and mental health AI applications
ai_classification_reasoning:
This role is directly working on AI systems - optimizing LLM
inference, deploying real-time voice AI agents, and serving
ML models in production. While it's infrastructure-focused,
the work involves hands-on AI deployment, inference
optimization, and GPU orchestration which is
building/deploying AI systems, not just supporting them.
